analysis.reasoning: Core message: A Latvian infectious disease expert endorses vaccination with the quote 'I did it because this is the way,' adding pro-vaccine hashtags. There is no explicit reference to the European Union, its policies, unity, global role, or achievements. Evaluation per narrative: EU1 (EU success story) – not mentioned; the tweet is about vaccination, not EU history or achievements. EU2 (EU unity) – no mention of EU solidarity or coordinated action. EU3 (EU useful for its citizens) – while vaccines could relate to public health, the tweet does not attribute any action or benefit to the EU; it’s a national-level endorsement without EU framing. EU4 (EU avant-garde actor) – no claim about EU leadership or pioneering regulation. EU5 (EU champion of fair causes) – not applicable. EU6 (EU contributes to a better world) – not applicable. Conclusion: The tweet does not promote any listed EU narratives.
